data.description:
action

Range: 60 feet
Components: S
Duration: hour
A wave of destruction crashes down upon the target.

action
Range: (30-foot
Self
Componenls: V
Duration: Inslantaneous
You sense the presence of magic in all objects, creatures, and forces in a 30-foot radius around you. You learn the types of magical auras present, but not their location or strength.
The spell remains active as long as you concentrate on it, up to the maximum duration.
Increases your movement speed by 10 feet.
For duration, can the you sense presence and the location poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases of within 30 feel of you. Vou also identify kind
Allows the caster to read surface thoughts of a target
